evidence.description: EC-18 (network FS hang / IPC timeout → UnexpectedError) verified at lines 107-122 with timeoutMs:10 fast mock; PROP-014 late-arrival protection verified at lines 124-189.
EC-20 (HMR boot flag reset) verified at lines 138-158 via static-source scan asserting bootAttempted is non-exported and __resetBootFlagForTesting__() returns flag to false.
EC-04, EC-05, EC-06, EC-07, EC-08, EC-14, EC-17, EC-19 covered with explicit test cases at lines 79-459.

FIND-401 closure verified: invoke_app_startup, InitialUIState, and all DTO types removed (search of full source 1-287 finds no occurrence). FIND-405 closure verified at line 150: `Path::new(&raw_path).is_absolute()` replaces starts_with('/'). FIND-402 closure verified at lines 54-106 (settings_file_path uses XDG_CONFIG_HOME with HOME fallback) and line 182 (invoke_configure_vault calls settings_save_impl after stat validation). generate_handler! at lines 274-283 registers exactly: greet, try_vault_path, invoke_configure_vault, settings_load, settings_save, fs_stat_dir, fs_list_markdown, fs_read_file.

FIND-401 consequence verified: runTsAppStartupPipeline (lines 242-385) pre-resolves settings_load + fs_stat_dir + fs_list_markdown + fs_read_file IPC calls then runs the pure runAppStartupPipeline with synchronous port adapters. Errors at each I/O stage are caught and translated to AppStartupError variants. CRIT-013 verified at lines 161-165: defaultClockNow uses Math.round(performance.timeOrigin + performance.now()), no Date.now().

FIND-409 closure verified at lines 226-287: synchronization-primitive gate Promise pattern correctly asserts store value is 'Loading' BEFORE releasing the IPC gate. FIND-410 closure verified at lines 403-428: typeof document === 'undefined' confirms no DOM env; @testing-library/svelte/pure import succeeds.
